labels.name: b4_audit
labels.description: Analyze a software stack against the B4 Index. Provide a list of tool/category names, and get per-tool scoring plus a portfolio summary with quadrant distribution, BEWARE spend, and priority actions. [B4 Pro — the free tier includes b4_browse and b4_score.]

labels.name: b4_compare
labels.description: Compare build vs buy for a specific software category. Returns side-by-side analysis with the category's scores, vendor options, AI replacement approach, and action steps for each path. [B4 Pro — the free tier includes b4_browse and b4_score.]

labels.name: b4_recommend
labels.description: Get B4 Index recommendations from a natural language description of a software need or business context. Matches the description to relevant categories and returns top matches with scores, quadrants, and actionable recommendations. [B4 Pro — the free tier includes b4_browse and b4_score.]
